title: BEM-531.00 cleanup preflight
objective:
Run script:
"""
archive_root = Path('governance/archive/bem531_00_cleanup_preflight_20260517')
archive_root.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
manifest = archive_root / 'MANIFEST.md'
report = Path('governance/reports/bem531_00_cleanup_preflight_report.md')
report.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
proof = Path('governance/codex/proofs/bem531_00_cleanup_preflight.txt')
proof.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

# Conservative cleanup for internal-contour roadmap start.
# Archive only superseded planning/audit artifacts and stale pending tasks that are no longer active.
active_keep = [
  'governance/tasks/pending/BEM531_INTERNAL_ROLE_CONTOUR_ROADMAP.md',
  'governance/reports/bem531_claude_consolidated_contour_status.md',
  'governance/reports/bem531_claude_review_applied.md'
]
active_keep_set = set(active_keep)

candidates = []
reasons = {}
explicit = [
  'governance/tasks/pending/BEM530_INTERNAL_CONTOUR_IMPROVEMENT_ROADMAP.md',
  'governance/tasks/pending/BEM532_REPOSITORY_ARCHIVE_CLEANUP_ROADMAP.md',
  'governance/reports/bem530_internal_contour_audit_and_roadmap.md',
  'governance/reports/bem531_internal_role_contour_audit.md',
  'governance/reports/bem531_curator_role_audit.md',
  'governance/reports/bem531_full_curator_entry_architecture_audit.md',
  'governance/reports/bem531_claude_internal_contour_roadmap_update.md'
]
for name in explicit:
    p = Path(name)
    if p.exists() and str(p) not in active_keep_set:
        candidates.append(p)
        reasons[str(p)] = 'superseded by BEM-531 roadmap v2 / consolidated Claude report'

# stale proof artifacts from superseded audit/planning attempts; keep current proof files harmless but archive obsolete planning proof.
for folder in [Path('governance/codex/proofs'), Path('governance/codex/tasks'), Path('governance/codex/results')]:
    if folder.exists():
        for f in folder.iterdir():
            n = f.name
            if n.startswith('bem530_internal_contour_audit') or n.startswith('bem531_internal_role_contour_audit') or n.startswith('bem531_curator_role_audit') or n.startswith('bem531_full_curator_entry_audit') or n.startswith('bem531_add_cleanup_first_task'):
                candidates.append(f)
                reasons[str(f)] = 'superseded audit/planning artifact before Claude-approved roadmap v2'

# Deduplicate and archive by copying to archive path then unlinking original.
seen = set()
moved = []
skipped = []
for src in candidates:
    s = str(src)
    if s in seen or s in active_keep_set:
        continue
    seen.add(s)
    if not src.exists() or not src.is_file():
        continue
    dest = archive_root / s
    dest.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    if dest.exists():
        skipped.append(s + ' destination exists')
        continue
    dest.write_text(src.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    src.unlink()
    moved.append((s, str(dest), reasons.get(s, 'obsolete artifact')))
    changed_files.extend([s, str(dest)])

# Active contour validation.
required_active = [
  '.github/workflows/codex-runner.yml',
  'governance/state/roadmap_state.json',
  'governance/state/role_cycle_state.json',
  'governance/transport/results.jsonl',
  'governance/tasks/pending/BEM531_INTERNAL_ROLE_CONTOUR_ROADMAP.md'
]
validation = []
validation_pass = True
for name in required_active:
    p = Path(name)
    exists = p.exists()
    validation.append('- ' + name + ': exists=' + str(exists))
    if not exists:
        validation_pass = False

wf = Path('.github/workflows/codex-runner.yml')
wf_text = wf.read_text(errors='ignore') if wf.exists() else ''
no_schedule = 'schedule:' not in wf_text
python_executor = 'python' in wf_text.lower() or 'Python executor' in wf_text
validation.append('- codex-runner no_schedule=' + str(no_schedule))
validation.append('- codex-runner python_executor=' + str(python_executor))
if not no_schedule or not python_executor:
    validation_pass = False

manifest_lines = ['# BEM-531.00 Cleanup Preflight Manifest', '', 'Дата: 2026-05-17 | 12:48 (UTC+3)', '', '## Moved files']
if moved:
    for src, dst, reason in moved:
        manifest_lines.append('- ' + src + ' -> ' + dst + ' | reason: ' + reason)
else:
    manifest_lines.append('- none')
manifest_lines += ['', '## Skipped']
manifest_lines += ['- ' + x for x in skipped] if skipped else ['- none']
manifest_lines += ['', '## Active validation'] + validation
manifest.write_text('\n'.join(manifest_lines) + '\n')
changed_files.append(str(manifest))

status = 'PASS' if validation_pass else 'BLOCKER'
report.write_text('# BEM-531.00 | Cleanup Preflight | ' + status + '\n\nДата: 2026-05-17 | 12:48 (UTC+3)\n\n## Scope\nArchive obsolete/superseded planning artifacts before internal role-contour development. No irreversible deletion.\n\n## Archive\n`governance/archive/bem531_00_cleanup_preflight_20260517/`\n\n## Moved files\n' + str(len(moved)) + '\n\n## Active validation\n' + '\n'.join(validation) + '\n\n## Blocker\n' + ('null' if validation_pass else 'active contour validation failed') + '\n')
changed_files.append(str(report))

proof.write_text('BEM-531.00 cleanup preflight ' + status + '. moved_files=' + str(len(moved)) + '. validation_pass=' + str(validation_pass) + '.\n')
changed_files.append(str(proof))
ops_applied.append('BEM-531.00 cleanup preflight archived superseded planning artifacts and validated active contours')
"""
No issue comments.
